Hybrid linear+full attention literature (Kimi Linear 2510.26692, hybrid analysis 2507.06457, NAtS-L 2602.03681, parallel hybrid 2505.19472) covers the parallel-bicameral attention primitive that DROSERA proposes. Other works (Star, Win-Fast) cover related two-phase or speed/accuracy mode-switch decisions.
